data.title: Komainu plans to support custody of Ondo's yield-based treasury tokens OUSG and USDY
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ondo Finance published a statement on the X platform stating that the digital asset custodian Komainu will support its two core yield-based U.S. Treasury tokens OUSG and USDY. OUSG is a permission-based U.S. Treasury product for qualified investors, and USDY is a daily interest-bearing "quasi-stable currency" for non-U.S. institutions. Institutional investors can now deposit such assets into Komainu's compliant custody platform.

data.title: The Trump family's crypto project WLFI stablecoin USD1 has a market value of $127.8 million, and more than 113 million have been issued on the BNB chain
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Coinmarketcap and BscScan data, as of now, the US dollar stablecoin USD1 of the Trump family crypto project WLFI has issued more than 113 million USD1 on the BNB Smart Chain (BSC), accounting for nearly 90% of the circulation. The current total market value of USD1 is close to 127.8 million, the 24-hour trading volume is nearly 100 million US dollars, and the combined TVL of BNB chain and Ethereum exceeds 30 million US dollars. USD1 will be 100% supported by short-term US Treasury bonds, US dollar deposits and other cash equivalents, 1:1 anchored to the US dollar, aiming to provide sovereign investors and institutions with safe and efficient cross-border trading tools.
In addition, USD1 recently opened the trading pool of Pancakeswap. Currently, Pancake's USD1 liquidity pool exceeds 19 million, and Pancake V3's USD1 TVL is 10.95 million US dollars. The lending product of BNB chain pledge agreement ListaDao has also recently opened USD1 Vault, which provides a USD1 lending quota of 20 million USD.

data.title: Superform announces the establishment of a foundation and will launch the UP token this year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Cross-chain yield market Superform Labs announced the establishment of a foundation and will launch the token UP this year. 
Earlier news, Superform Labs completed a $3 million strategic round of financing, led by VanEck Ventures, and participated by Polychain Capital, CMT Digital, Amber Group, Node Ventures, BlockTower Capital, Heartcore Capital, Maven11 Capital and UpTop Capital.

data.title: Bitcoin mining machine manufacturer Auratine completes $153 million Series C financing, led by StepStone Group
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining machine manufacturer Auratine has completed a $153 million Series C financing, led by StepStone Group, with participation from Maverick Silicon, Premji Invest, Samsung Catalyst Fund, Qualcomm Ventures, Mayfield, MARA Holdings, GSBackers and other existing investors.
Auradin co-founder and CEO Rajiv Khemani said that this round of financing was oversubscribed by more than 22%, and the new funds will be used to enter the field of artificial intelligence infrastructure. (The Block)

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 672 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 2578 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 672 BTC today, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 455 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 571,869 BTC, worth US$40.01 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 2,578 ETH, of which Fidelity had an outflow of 2,248 ETH. Fidelity currently holds 363,525 ETH, worth US$573.28 million.

data.title: CI Galaxy Solana ETF Begins Trading on Toronto Stock Exchange
data.description: According to Odaily, CI Global Asset Management and Galaxy Asset Management have launched the CI Galaxy Solana ETF, which is now trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange. For the first three months, the management fee for the ETF is set at 0%. The ETF, known as SOLX, directly invests in Solana tokens (SOL) and is managed by CI Global Asset Management, with advisory services provided by Galaxy Asset Management.

data.title: CI Galaxy Solana ETF Launched by Galaxy and CI Global Lists on Toronto Stock Exchange
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CI Galaxy Solana ETF launched by CI Global Asset Management and Galaxy Asset Management began trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange. The management fee for the first three months was 0%. SOLX directly invests in Solana tokens SOL, managed by CI GAM, and provided advisory services by Galaxy Asset Management ("Galaxy"). (Businesswire)

data.title: Binance will adjust the settlement frequency of AERGOUSDT U-margin perpetual contract funding rate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will adjust the AERGOUSDT U-margin perpetual contract funding rate settlement frequency at 22:30 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 16, 2025. The funding rate settlement frequency will be adjusted from once every four hours to once every two hours.

data.title: New Wallet Withdraws Significant UNI and AAVE Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, OnChain Lens has reported that a newly established wallet has withdrawn 818,474 UNI tokens valued at $4.21 million from Cumberland. Additionally, 19 hours ago, the same wallet extracted 32,708 AAVE tokens worth $4.51 million.

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 818,474 UNI from Cumberland
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 818,474 UNI from Cumberland, worth US$4.21 million. The wallet withdrew 32,708 AAVE 19 hours ago, worth US$4.51 million.
